title: Self Stirring Coffee Mug- High Speed Self Stirring Mug with 2 Stirring Rods Straw Coaster - 350ML Rechargeable Automatic Stirrer for Tea/Chocolate/Milk - Self Stirring Cup for Home Office Travel
description:
About this item
7000 RPM High-speed Mixing: This self stirring coffee mug is equipped with a powerful motor that can achieve a high-speed stirring of up to 7000 RPM. Whether it's coffee, milk, or protein powder, it can be quickly and evenly mixed. This self stirring mug is also suitable for mixing hot chocolate, cocoa, juice, chia seeds, matcha, eggs and other mixable beverages, allowing you to easily enjoy delicious drinks
Fast Charging: The built-in rechargeable battery frees you from the trouble of changing batteries. When the battery is low, simply plug in the charging cable to quickly recharge. After fully charged, the electric self stirring mug can be non-stop stirred for up to 30 minutes, allowing you to enjoy the fun of mixing anytime, anywhere
Easy to Use & Waterproof for Easy Cleaning: Simply press and hold the button to start, and press again to turn off, no complicated settings. The cup lid has a waterproof design, the entire automatic stirring coffee mug can be rinsed with water, saving time and effort. Please do not fully immerse the cup lid in water
Practical Design: Our self mixing coffee mug is equipped with a high-quality rubber seal, effectively preventing liquid leakage during stirring. Now the mixer cup comes with a glass straw, the cup lid ingeniously incorporates a straw hole, secured by a tight-fitting rubber cover that can be easily opened as needed, allowing for smooth straw insertion and double the enjoyment of both mixing and sipping
Safe Materials: The self stirring cup is made of food grade high borosilicate glass and plastic, ensuring safe drinking, and it can withstand temperature changes without cracking
reviews_5s: This is a good cup and a nice size for my morning coffee. I like how it is rechargeable and I like the stirring feature. It comes with 3 attachments, a glass straw and a nice cup coaster. I just hope it lasts long. Some of the other brands I have purchased, that needed batteries, did not last.
